notes:
A diagnostic build to pin down the zoom save issue.

**Under the hood**

- Adds temporary local-only diagnostic logging around the focused-view (zoom)
  save path so the exact point where an edit fails to persist can be captured
  from a single reproduction (UUIDs and counts only — never note content, per the
  Privacy Invariant). No behavior change; the logging is removed once the issue
  is fixed.
